title: Build a label
prompt: Write label(name, count) that returns a string like 'errors: 3' using an f-string. label('errors', 3) is 'errors: 3'.

help.plain: Build one string that puts the name, a colon and space, then the count.
help.analogy: Like a shipping label: field name, colon, value.
help.nudge: An f-string lets you drop both values straight into the text with {}.

details.restate: Return a formatted string of the form 'name: count' using an f-string. Note the colon and single space between them.

terms.meaning: a string prefixed with f that lets you insert values inside {}
